# Ruben Cipriano — Software Developer

> Portugal-based software developer building scalable web applications across
> front-end and back-end, with a focus on React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript,
> C# and SQL.

## About
- Name: Ruben Cipriano
- Role: Software Developer (full-stack, front-end focused)
- Location: Portugal
- Website: https://rubencipriano.top
- Email: rubencipriano13@gmail.com

## Core skills
TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Angular, Tailwind CSS, SCSS, HTML/CSS,
C# / .NET, ASP.NET Core, Node.js, Express, Java, REST APIs, SOAP, Entity Framework,
SQL Server, MySQL, Redis, Keycloak (OAuth2 / OIDC), Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins,
Azure DevOps, AWS, CI/CD, Git, SVN, Jest, NUnit, Agile / Scrum.

## Languages
Portuguese (native), English (C1, professional working proficiency).

## Experience
- Full-stack Developer — Growmate (2025–present), consulting for client IRN, Lisbon.
  Owns payment/fraud-prevention flows, Keycloak + Chave Móvel Digital (CMD) auth,
  React/Next.js front ends and C#/.NET back-end services, Kafka, Redis; mentors juniors.
- Full-stack Developer — Neotalent / VORTAL (2024–2025), e-tendering public platform (C#, React).
  Operations Team II — escalation tier that resolves the underlying defects; fixed 100+ urgent/critical
  issues (authentication, payments, accessibility, UI/UX).
- Back-end Developer — VIA Consulting (2023–2024). Solo-delivered a stalled banking
  integration to production; shipped online pet insurance now live in the Millennium BCP app.
- Front-end Developer (Intern) — Emvenci (2022), Angular design system.
- Software Developer (Intern) — Arquiconsult (2020), C#/ASP.NET Core back-office.

## Projects
- OpenHours (https://horas.zerodown.top) — multi-user, self-hosted time-logging app on top of
  OpenProject; drafts entries locally and syncs to OpenProject with a policy-aware calendar.
  React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind, Fastify, PostgreSQL, OpenProject API. In use at IRN.
- Income Planner — Portugal (https://finances.zerodown.top) — Portuguese income & tax planner
  comparing employee vs freelancer vs company (Lda.), with investment projections and PDF/Excel
  export. Svelte, Vite, PocketBase, Zod.
- Discord Music Bot + Dashboard (https://bot.zerodown.top) — multi-guild MEE6-style Discord bot
  (YouTube music, Twitch notifications) configured via a web dashboard. Next.js, React, TypeScript,
  discord.js, Node.js, SQLite, Docker.
- ZeroDown (https://zerodown.top) — personal brand / homelab homepage. Node.js, Express, TypeScript.
- Developer Portfolio (https://rubencipriano.top) — this site. Angular 20 SSR, TypeScript, SCSS.

## Education
- CTeSP, Web & Mobile Application Development — ISTEC (2020–2022)
- Technician in Management & Programming of Computer Systems — INETE (2017–2020)
